name: add_columns
description: Skill 5: Add calculated and/or restricted columns to any SQL view (SV_) in SAP Datasphere. Calculated columns: arithmetic or CASE-with-ELSE expressions (e.g. NetAmount + TaxAmount). Restricted columns: CASE-WHEN without ELSE — result is NULL when condition not met. Accepts any view name, any column names, and any SQL expressions. Reads the live CSN, injects xpr definitions, and deploys. Dry-run by default. Set deploy=true to apply.

view_name.description: Technical name of the SQL view to extend (must start with SV_).

space_id.description: Datasphere space ID. Available: ZZ_BDC_HARNESS_1, ZZ_BDC_HARNESS_2.

columns.description: List of columns to add. Each item defines one calculated or restricted column.

column_type.description: calculated = arithmetic/CASE with ELSE. restricted = CASE WHEN without ELSE.

data_type.description: CDS type: cds.Decimal, cds.String, cds.Integer, etc.

expression.description: SQL expression. Arithmetic: 'NetAmount + TaxAmount'. CASE: 'CASE WHEN BillingDocumentType = \'F2\' THEN NetAmount END'.

deploy.description: Set true to deploy after dry-run review. Requires confirm and acknowledge_ai.

confirm.description: Human confirmation flag. Must be true when deploy=true.

acknowledge_ai.description: AI literacy acknowledgement. Must be true when deploy=true.

examples.description: Add calculated column: GrossAmount = NetAmount + TaxAmount
Add restricted column: InvoiceRevenue = NetAmount only for F2 billing type

columns.name: InvoiceRevenue
columns.label: Invoice Revenue
columns.expression: CASE WHEN BillingDocumentType = 'F2' THEN NetAmount END

examples.description: Add multiple columns at once and deploy

columns.name: InvoiceRevenue
columns.expression: CASE WHEN BillingDocumentType = 'F2' THEN NetAmount END

columns.name: HighValueRevenue
columns.expression: CASE WHEN NetAmount > 10000 THEN NetAmount END

view_name.description: Technical name of the SQL view to extend (must start with SV_).

space_id.description: Datasphere space ID containing the view. Available: ZZ_BDC_HARNESS_1, ZZ_BDC_HARNESS_2.

deploy.description: Set true to deploy after dry-run review. Requires confirm and acknowledge_ai.

confirm.description: Human confirmation flag. Must be true when deploy=true.

acknowledge_ai.description: AI literacy acknowledgement. Must be true when deploy=true to confirm you reviewed the AI-generated output before execution.

examples.description: Dry-run: generate updated CSN with both calculated fields without deploying
Deploy: add calculated fields to SV_BILLING_DOC_JOINED and deploy immediately
